data.title: DOGE aiming for $0.16 in February. Short-term: $0.12; Medium-term: $0.16-$0.175. Bullish at $0.13, support at $0.11.
data.description: Summary of DOGE Price Predictions:In the short term, Dogecoin's price is anticipated to reach $0.12 within one week. Looking further ahead, the medium-term forecast for the next month places the price in the range of $0.16 to $0.175. Analysts are eyeing a bullish breakout level of $0.13, while cautioning that $0.11 serves as critical support. These predictions suggest potential fluctuations in the Dogecoin market, with varying targets and levels to watch for in upcoming trading sessions.

data.title: News article discusses need for cloud-based mobile automation for scaling social media in 2026 due to mobile platform growth.
data.description: In Singapore on January 30, 2026, it was reported that the shift towards mobile-native social media platforms is impacting scaling strategies originally designed for desktop tools. The growth on platforms such as TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and messaging apps is projected to rely less on traditional methods by the same year. This trend underscores the emergence of mobile platforms as key players in the social media landscape, highlighting a need for innovative approaches to accommodate the shift.
The Russian Armed Forces have ‘liberated’ the populated settlement of Ternovatoe in the Zaporizhia region and Bereostok in the Donetsk People's Republic, the Russian Defense Ministry reported.
From January 24 to 30, in response to Ukraine's attacks, massive and six group strikes were carried out against defense industry enterprises, the Russian Defense Ministry reported.

data.title: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals likely to report lower Q4 earnings with $10.74 per share, down from $12.07. Quarterly revenue estimated at $3.79 billion. Collaborated with Tessera Therapeutics for TSRA-196 development. Stock fell 0.2% to $749.44.
data.description: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN) is set to report its fourth-quarter earnings on Friday, Jan. 30, before the market opens. Analysts are predicting earnings of $10.74 per share for the Tarrytown-based company, a decrease from $12.07 per share in the same period last year. The consensus forecast for Regeneron Pharmaceuticals' quarterly revenue stands at $3.79 billion, consistent with the previous year’s figures. In a recent joint venture with Tessera Therapeutics, Inc., Regeneron Pharmaceuticals revealed plans to collaborate on the development and commercialization of TSRA-196. The company's stock saw a minor decline of 0.2%, closing at $749.44 on Thursday. For more in-depth analysis and up-to-date analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga, where data can be sorted by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, rating change, and other metrics.

data.title: Hong Kong sees 11.8% deposit spike in 2025, with RMB holdings falling by 4.2% to RMB960.1 billion in December due to company shifts.
data.description: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) recently disclosed that total deposits experienced a substantial 11.8% increase in 2025. However, in December alone, there was a notable decline of 4.2% in RMB deposits, reaching RMB960.1 billion. This downturn was attributed to shifts in corporate fund movements during that period.

data.title: SOL at $115.38 drops by 6.35%, oversold RSI at 34.41; targets $150-162 show 13-26% increase to $130-145 by Feb.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Solana is currently being traded at $115.38, reflecting a 6.35% decrease. Despite this decline, the Relative Strength Index (RSI) sits at 34.41, indicating an oversold condition. Analysts have set price targets for Solana between $150 and $162, proposing a potential recovery of 13-26%, bringing the price back to the range of $130 to $145.

data.title: Negative equity mortgages in Hong Kong decreased by 32% to 21,304 in Q4 2025, down from 31,449, indicating a property market stabilization post stamp duty removal.
data.description: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) has reported a decrease in negative equity mortgage cases to 21,304 in the fourth quarter of 2025, a notable decline from the previous figure of 31,449. This decrease is seen as a positive indicator of recovery in the Hong Kong property market. The improvement comes following the removal of stamp duty, indicating a positive trend in the market's performance.

data.title: Cardano aims for $0.36 rebound from $0.32 support. Short-term target: $0.36, medium-term: $0.30-$0.42. Key levels $0.30 and $0.42.
data.description: Summary of ADA Price Predictions: In the short term, the target for ADA is $0.36 within a week. Looking ahead to the medium term, the forecast ranges between $0.30 and $0.42 over the next month. The bullish breakout level is set at $0.42, while a critical support level lies at $0.30. Despite fluctuations, analysts predict positive movements for ADA in the near future.
